title: The Wealth Alignment Practice
subtitle: A weekly ritual for anchoring wealth as a natural rhythm in your daily routines
excerpt: A weekly ritual ceremony from Week 8 of the Money Journal program. Works through the five-part release, allow, integrate, anchor shape, with the specific intention of aligning daily habits with the energy of wealth.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Week 8 Ritual in MONEY Journal (Rebecca Page, 2025). Used with permission as part of the homemade.education Mindset library.

practice.whenToUse: Use once at the start of a week to anchor the intention that your daily habits and routines are running in alignment with wealth rather than against it.

content.text: A weekly ritual for making wealth a rhythm in daily life rather than a goal at a distance. Works through the five-part ceremony shape: prepare, release, allow, integrate, anchor.

Sit somewhere quiet. Picture your coming week as a sequence of moments: morning, work, evening, each one running with a calm, clear sense of purpose. Notice any sense of chaos or resistance in how you relate to money day-to-day.
I am ready to release all chaos, resistance, and inconsistency in how I relate to money. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align to and allow structure, order, and flow that naturally support wealth in my life. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Take a slow breath in and all the way out, releasing any remaining tension. Visualise golden light weaving through your daily routines: morning, work, evening, each one running with calm and ease.
Write this anchor statement in your own handwriting. Say it aloud:
This week, my daily actions reflect the energy of wealth and ease.
Adapted from the Week 8 Ritual in MONEY Journal (Rebecca Page, 2025). Part of the 12-week Money Journal ceremony series.
